definition: Customer has raised multiple support tickets recently and NPS has dropped sharply, indicating a poor service experience is actively driving churn intent.
engagement_policy: No promotional content until the service issue is confirmed resolved

definition: Customer has been completely inactive for an extended period with zero app engagement, suggesting they have silently moved to a competitor without raising any friction.
engagement_policy: Win-back window closes after 180 days - do not invest in customers beyond this threshold

definition: Customer has progressively reduced engagement across all channels - app sessions, email opens, and purchase recency have all declined without a single dominant trigger signal.
engagement_policy: Do not send generic campaigns - personalise outreach to the customer's top product category

definition: Customer is actively engaged, purchasing recently, and reporting high satisfaction. No retention intervention required.
engagement_policy: No retention spend - route to referral or advocacy programme instead
